testimonial: Randall did an excellent job on upgrading the exterior of my home with new window headers, shutters, trim and repairs. I am extremely happy with how it turned out, the service I received, his attention to detail and the quality workmanship. I have already had many complimenting neighbors asking me who did the work! Randall is very professional, easy going and someone you can trust to have work on your home. I highly recommend him.
